question: How many customers do not have any payment method?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Payment_Methods);

back_translation.intent: 统计没有支付方式的客户数量
filters: customer_id NOT IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Payment_Methods)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问没有支付方式的客户数量，SQL反向翻译描述正确使用了NOT IN子查询来排除有支付方式的客户，并通过COUNT统计数量。
